## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
      (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `chore:`).
- [ ] If this changes a decision, an ADR was added/updated under `docs/adr/`.
- [ ] No unfilled template placeholders remain (`make placeholders`).
- [ ] Lint and tests pass locally (`make check`).
